name: google_trends_report
description: Trend intelligence report from a company website URL using web fetch and search (Google Trends–style research). Requires connected runtime with search + URL fetch.
when_to_use: User provides a company website URL and wants trend or industry momentum insight
User asks what to focus on based on trends for their business
User combines a URL with market research, trends, or Google Trends language

requirements.notes: Not a substitute for the official Google Trends API unless the host integrates it; uses search-backed directional signals.
